prompt: You need to read the inventory levels of WooCommerce products, check the current stock quantity (stock_quantity) for each product against the safety threshold (stock_threshold), identify all products with stock strictly below the threshold (stock_quantity < stock_threshold), and automatically update a Google Sheets purchase requisition list named WooCommerce Stock Alert (already in Google Sheets). For each low-stock product, record it in Google Sheets and send an individual email notification to the purchasing manager (the email address is in purchasing_manager_email.txt). You need to find all low-stock products, record them and send emails. The email template can be found in stock_alert_email_template.md. The email account credentials are in admin_credentials.txt in the workspace.

For each low-stock product, record it in Google Sheets and send an individual email notification to the purchasing manager (the email address is in purchasing_manager_email.txt). You need to find all low-stock products, record them and send emails. The email template can be found in stock_alert_email_template.md. The email account credentials are in admin_credentials.txt in the workspace.

You need to find all low-stock products, record them and send emails. The email template can be found in stock_alert_email_template.md. The email account credentials are in admin_credentials.txt in the workspace.
